title: Software Development Speed: 100 MPH vs 4 MPH? The Great Divide #shorts
summary: Cyril Imhof examines the stark differences in software development velocity across tech companies, comparing rapid feature deployment at some organizations against slower development cycles at others. The video frames this disparity as a central challenge in the industry.
writeup: Cyril Imhof examines the wide gap in software development velocity across tech companies, contrasting organizations that ship features rapidly with those stuck in slower development cycles. The short frames this disparity in developer productivity as a central challenge in the industry. The takeaway is that comparable engineering teams can operate at drastically different speeds, making velocity itself a defining organizational difference rather than a fixed technical constraint.
